raw_text: alberto esteller torres aerospace engineer spanish, 03/01/1992 c/ emilio lluch 26, 11-a. 46014, valencia, spain +44 7477944342 linkedin.com/in/albertoesteller estelleralberto@gmail.com education university of glasgow, glasgow, united kingdom 2014 - until now + msc aeronautical engineering (21.2/22 gpa on first semester, first class expected). final project: aerodynamic studies on high speed intakes (cfd related) involved in jet-x society (www. jet-x.org): design of an operating turbofan engine (turbine team member). + group projects: aerospace design project, helicopter design project. politechnika rzeszowska, rzeszow, poland 2013 - 2014 + aerospace engineering, aircraft engines specialisation - 4th year (erasmus programme) final degree project, grade: 9.5/10. title: small turbofan for personal jet aviation design. universidad politécnica de valencia, valencia, spain 2010 - 2013 + aerospace engineering, aircraft engines specialisation (high performance group) - 1st, 2nd, 3rd year. + main projects developed: pid design for ar.drone, cfd analysis, turbofan engines historic development. la purisima franciscanas, valencia, spain 2008 - 2010 high school graduate in technical sciences (first class honours). * selectividad (a-level equivalent): physics (10), mathematics (10), spanish (8), technical drawing (10), english (9). ork experience spanish air force, air force base of zaragoza, ala 15 july 2014-august 2014 + aeronautical engineer internship (full-time). quality control and maintenance of mcdonnell douglas f/a-18 hornet. advanced familiarization course of all the embedded systems and inspection tests (spanish air force certificate obtained). urbanizacion play-puig, valencia, spain 2008 - 2013 + swimming pool lifeguard and swimming coach for groups (different levels and ages). other training and courses lean manufacturing course by eads (2013) + autodesk inventor course cnc machining programming software skills: o office suite (excel, word, powerpoint) o matlab code and simulink (and other toolboxes) o cfd software (star-ccm+ and fluent) o cad software (autodesk inventor, catia v5, siemens nx) o other software: gasturb, statgraphics, wolfram mathematica... leadership - experience dealing with groups of people (groups of more than 10 people as a swimming coach). very interested and motivated to learn and acquire new knowledge and develop efficiently my job. always wanting to improve. ability to work within a team (developed several group projects during college period) and also work independently. languages + native spanish advanced level of english (cae cambridge, grade: 71%. bttoefl, grade: 90/120) basic level of polish volunteer for the non-governmental organization petjades from 2008 to 2010. * driving license (obtained in 2010) + royal aeronautical society affiliate. interests collaboration in aeronautical webpage forum. music. degree in saxophone by the iturbi valencia conservatory of music. music dj-ing and production (running a weekly radio programme in clubbing fm 103.9 valencia). photography and picture editing (nikon course in 2010). arduino micro controller programming. swimming and winter sports such as skiing. references academic proffesional dr. marco vezza maj. antonio huertas clemente r802 level 8, aerospace sciences, sinca ala 15 james watt building south, b.a.zaragoza. glasgow g12 8qq carretera del aeropuerto s/n 50071, zaragoza telephone: 976708379 ahuecle@ea.mde.es telephone: 01413304107 marco.vezza@glasgow.ac.uk
